content:
Write your text here.
What is RAG?#During the course, I was introduced to Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) as a way to improve how Large Language Models generate answers.
One of the main problems with LLMs is that they can sometimes produce incorrect or outdated information. RAG helps with this by retrieving relevant information from an external source before generating a response. This means the model does not rely only on its built-in knowledge, but can also use specific documents or data as context.
I found this approach especially interesting because it makes chatbot systems more reliable and more useful in practice. It also creates a clearer separation between the language model and the knowledge source, which makes the system easier to update and maintain.
title: Intro RAG Reflection

content:
RAG Chatbot in Dify#In this project, I created a small RAG chatbot in Dify. The purpose was to understand how a chatbot can use uploaded or imported content as its knowledge base instead of relying only on general model knowledge.
I worked on setting up the chatbot, importing data, splitting the text into smaller chunks, and making the content searchable. This allowed the chatbot to retrieve relevant text passages and use them as context when generating answers.
The project gave me a better understanding of how retrieval, indexing, and generation work together in a RAG-based solution.
title: RAG Chatbot in Dify

RAG Reflection A short reflection on retrieval-augmented generation and why it matters.
RAG Demo A summary of my Dify chatbot project and what I learned from building it.

As part of the introduction to AI-driven applications, we were introduced to the concept of Large Language Models (LLMs) and their role in modern software development.
From my understanding, an LLM is a model trained on large amounts of text data, which enables it to predict and generate human-like language.
Through this course, I expect to learn how AI can be integrated into software solutions and how LLMs can be used as part of a structured development process. This portfolio will document that learning journey through reflections and projects.
title: About
